description: A customer has opted for home delivery of their new EV. A delivery specialist must transport the vehicle and walk the customer through its key features.

nodes.task_description: Transport the new vehicle to the customer's home at the scheduled time.

expected_outcome.value: The vehicle is delivered safely and on time.

nodes.task_description: Help the customer set up their mobile app and pair it with the vehicle.

expected_outcome.value: The customer's phone is successfully paired, and they are logged into the app.

nodes.task_description: Provide a personalized tutorial on key EV features, such as charging, regenerative braking, and one-pedal driving.

expected_outcome.value: The customer understands and is comfortable with the basic operation of their new EV.
